app.eyebrow: 14-day free trial, Premium only 5 KM monthly
app.headline: Your digital service book, garage, and car community.
app.subheadline: Register, add a vehicle, track mileage and service deadlines, then generate a sample monthly report from the database.
app.authSubtitle: Login and registration run through the backend and PostgreSQL database.
app.name: Full name
app.vehicleFormSubtitle: Choose a make, enter model and mileage. Data is saved in the database.
app.noVehicles: No vehicles yet. Register and add your first car.
app.premiumDescription: PDF reports, AI mechanic, expense analytics, and advanced reminders.
app.disclaimer: AI mechanic and reports are assistive tools and do not replace professional diagnostics.
app.aiSubtitle: Enter symptoms and get possible causes, severity, and next steps.
app.symptoms: Example: car shakes at idle, white smoke on cold start...
app.forumSubtitle: Example topics by brand and model, with votes and replies.
app.stripeNote: Stripe is not configured yet. Add Stripe keys to .env.
app.issuesSubtitle: Examples by model, symptoms, severity, repair cost estimate, and community votes.
